subject: (no subject)
body: No worries. I understand your situation. I will leave on the 9th will be back on 13th. Again leave on the 16 and back on 18th. I had fixed an appoint for you on Monday with Shk. Hamad. Which I shall cancel and fix later. Let me know when you plan again your trip to Doha.
body_html: No worries. I understand your situation. I will leave on the 9th will be back on 13th. Again leave on the 16 and back on 18th. I had fixed an appoint for you on Monday with Shk. Hamad. Which I shall cancel and fix later. Let me know when you plan again your trip to Doha.

subject: (no subject)
body:
thank you for being understanding, I hate canceling. but i will explain when i see you. . the states will be in turmoil for awhile no matter who wins, its also possible that there will be court battles to decide. like bush gore. . one thing is for sure, women are angry, they have more power, and race relations are sensitve.

---

subject: (no subject)
body:
unfortunatlely, too much work around the election. I will need to cancel doha before the 9th, it is soooo crazy. many stories to tell when i see you. when do you leave.? I feel badly about changes at the last minute, but i hope you understand.
